  • Constructor Details

    • HomeLocationTest

      public HomeLocationTest()

  • Method Details

    • setUp

      public void setUp()

    • testConstructor

      public void testConstructor()
      Tests the HomeLocation constructor and getters. Verifies that the HomeLocation is initialized correctly with the provided name and home.

    • testAddUpgrade

      public void testAddUpgrade()
      Tests the addUpgrade and getUpgradeList methods. Verifies that upgrades can be added to the HomeLocation and retrieved correctly.

    • testGetUpgradeList

      public void testGetUpgradeList()
      Tests the getUpgradeList method. Verifies that the correct list of upgrades is returned.

    • testGetHome

      public void testGetHome()
      Tests the getHome method. Verifies that the correct Home reference is returned.

    • testGetLocSimListDelegatesToHome

      public void testGetLocSimListDelegatesToHome()
      Tests the getLocSimList method. Verifies that the list of Sims in the HomeLocation is retrieved correctly.

    • testRemoveSimDelegatesToHome

      public void testRemoveSimDelegatesToHome()
      Tests the removeSim method. Verifies that removing a Sim from the HomeLocation correctly updates the list of Sims in the Home.

    • testSetHome

      public void testSetHome()
      Tests the setHome method. Verifies that the Home reference can be set and retrieved correctly.

    • testInheritsLocFunctionality

      public void testInheritsLocFunctionality()
      Tests inherited location functionality. Verifies that the HomeLocation inherits the correct functionality from its parent class.

    • testMultipleUpgrades

      public void testMultipleUpgrades()
      Tests multiple upgrades. Verifies that multiple upgrades can be added and retrieved correctly.

    • testUpgradeDetails

      public void testUpgradeDetails()
      Tests the details of each upgrade. Verifies that the details of each upgrade are correct.
